Features.//: Overridden by ConfigMap in Helm deployments. Valid: InboundAdapter=rest|kafka, OutboundAdapter=rest|kafka, Persistence=postgres|mongo, UseRedis=true|false (only with postgres).

RateLimit.//: Fixed-window rate limiter applied per-IP (and as the global limiter). Defaults match the original hardcoded scaffold values; override via Helm values.yaml > rateLimit.* (rendered into the ConfigMap as RateLimit__*).

ApplicationInsights.//: Prefer the APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING env var in production.
ApplicationInsights.//2: Leave blank locally to disable the Azure Monitor sink. Local runs without a connection string still produce ASP.NET Core / EF traces in-process — they just don't ship anywhere.
